title: At least 13 Rohingya refugees among the dead in Bangladesh landslides
description: Authorities in Rohingya refugee camps in Bangladesh used loudspeakers and a network of volunteers and community leaders to relocate people from risky areas to safety Thursday after landslides killed at least 13 refugees in the past few days.

de: Mindestens 13 Rohingya-Flüchtlinge unter den Toten bei Erdrutschen in Bangladesch. Behörden in Rohingya-Flüchtlingslagern in Bangladesch setzten am Donnerstag Lautsprecher und ein Netzwerk von Freiwilligen und Gemeindevorstehern ein, um Menschen aus Risikogebieten in Sicherheit zu bringen, nachdem in den vergangenen Tagen bei Erdrutschen mindestens 13 Flüchtlinge ums Leben gekommen waren.
en: At least 13 Rohingya refugees among the dead in Bangladesh landslides. Authorities in Rohingya refugee camps in Bangladesh used loudspeakers and a network of volunteers and community leaders to relocate people from risky areas to safety Thursday after landslides killed at least 13 refugees in the past few days.
la: Profugi Rohingya saltem XIII inter mortuos in Bangladesh proruit.
